Donate

MP for Brighton Kemptown and Peacehaven

Thank you to everyone who voted, campaigned and supported us. It’s an enormous honour and responsibility to serve the community and Party I love. I’ll work hard to deliver the change we need across Brighton Kemptown and Peacehaven.

Photo: Andrew Gardner / The Argus

Working hard for Brighton Kemptown and Peacehaven.

Here’s my priorities for us.

  • Get our economy working for you
  • Rebuild the NHS and cut waiting lists
  • Crack down on anti-social behaviour
  • Recruit more teachers in our local schools
  • Build more family homes and tackle sky-high rents

Chris Ward MP @chriswardmp ·
29 Apr 2049562048183287895

I am sickened and appalled by the attack in Golders Green this morning. My thoughts are with the Jewish community.

Antisemitism has no place in our country, and we must confront and stamp out this poison wherever it appears.

Twitter feed video.
The World at One @BBCWorldatOne

Two Jewish men have been seriously injured after being stabbed in Golders Green, London.

Chris Ward, Parliamentary Secretary in the Cabinet Office, says there must be a 'cultural change' to stamp out antisemitism

Chris Ward MP @chriswardmp ·
28 Apr 2049113686300581974

I’m so proud of our club and how forward thinking we are.

This will be a massive boost for the women’s game and shows @BHAFC and @BHAFCWomen leading the way once again.

Can’t wait to see it built and up and running!

Brighton & Hove Albion @OfficialBHAFC

We are pleased to confirm plans for the UK and Europe's first purpose-built women's football stadium. 🏟️

It will be one of only three such stadiums in the world, putting the club at the forefront of the women's game globally. 🤩💫

‘Labour is rebuilding our relationship with Europe while restoring Britain’ – LabourList

Chris Ward MP @chriswardmp ·
28 Mar 2037889125420802297

This 👇👇👇

Rachel Reeves @RachelReevesMP

I’ve long believed in the power of procurement.

It can strengthen Britain's critical industrial resilience as part of what I call 'securonomics'.

And applying a new 'public interest test' for contracting decisions will strengthen our public services.

https://www.theguardian.com/business/2026/mar/26/british-suppliers-to-be-prioritised-for-contracts-in-sectors-vital-to-national-security?CMP=Share_iOSApp_Other
Reply on Twitter 2037889125420802297 Retweet on Twitter 2037889125420802297 0 Like on Twitter 2037889125420802297 1 X 2037889125420802297

About Chris

I’m Labour’s MP for Brighton Kemptown & Peacehaven. I was born and raised in Brighton and my parents grew up in Peacehaven. I’m a Brighton & Hove Albion season ticket holder and I care passionately about the City and the local community. I’ve worked for the Labour Party for much of the last 15 years, fighting for better housing, the NHS, a green energy revolution and a better Brexit deal.

14 years of Conservative failure has left our public services at breaking point. NHS waiting lists are through the roof. The cost of living crisis has hit families hard. Rents and mortgages have soared. The climate crisis is being ignored. 

As your elected MP I’ll work hard to ensure a fairer, greener future for our City. I’ll be a national voice for local people, and I’ll deliver Labour’s plans to tackle the cost of living crisis, cut NHS waiting lists and build more homes.

  • Privacy
  • Cookie Policy (UK)
Manage Consent
To provide the best experiences, we use technologies like cookies to store and/or access device information. Consenting to these technologies will allow us to process data such as browsing behaviour or unique IDs on this site. Not consenting or withdrawing consent, may adversely affect certain features and functions.
Functional Always active
The technical storage or access is strictly necessary for the legitimate purpose of enabling the use of a specific service explicitly requested by the subscriber or user, or for the sole purpose of carrying out the transmission of a communication over an electronic communications network.
Preferences
The technical storage or access is necessary for the legitimate purpose of storing preferences that are not requested by the subscriber or user.
Statistics
The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for statistical purposes. The technical storage or access that is used exclusively for anonymous statistical purposes. Without a subpoena, voluntary compliance on the part of your Internet Service Provider, or additional records from a third party, information stored or retrieved for this purpose alone cannot usually be used to identify you.
Marketing
The technical storage or access is required to create user profiles to send advertising, or to track the user on a website or across several websites for similar marketing purposes.
